meaning: n.面向海的一面,沿海岸而筑的马路
examples: They decided to meet on the seafront.
We stayed in a sweet little hotel on the seafront.
To warn the people not to walk along the seafront in very windy weather, Mr. Reeder has advised the government to put up some signs.
Proposals to redevelop Morecambe's seafront have been thrown out by councillors for a third time.
The project will be a key part of the city council's grand design for the seafront.
